levels.label: PMH_2026-06-15_NOW_RESISTANCE
levels.reasoning: PMH 6/15 was support. Premarket 6/17: price gapped to 752.50 then immediately rejected through 752.09 and ground to 750.10 PML. Price is now BELOW 752.09 → flipped to resistance. Reclaim on 5m close = bull signal. Failure to reclaim = bear cascade confirmation.

levels.label: RTH_LOW_2026-06-16
levels.reasoning: 6/16 RTH session low. Premarket 6/17 tested and broke to 750.10 intraday, then recovered above 750.62. First structural bear target below 752.09. Loss of 750.62 on 5m close = bear cascade toward 750.00.
levels.notes: Drawn at premarket 6/17 — entity gMxYxG. Premarket pierced to 750.10 but recovering.

levels.label: ROUND_750
levels.reasoning: Round $750 level. Magnet — awareness only. NOT a trigger source. Premarket PML 750.10 came within $0.10 of this level today — elevated significance ahead of FOMC.

levels.label: PML_2026-06-15_CARRY
